title: EvidenceEnvelope
description: Immutable evidence envelope emitted per workflow step. Content-addressed via sha256(canonical_json(envelope_without_hash)).

workflowRunId.description: Unique run identifier for the workflow execution.

stepId.description: Step within the workflow run that produced this evidence.

actor.description: Principal (user or system) that triggered or executed the step.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this envelope was created.

hash.description: sha256 of the canonical JSON of this envelope with the hash field removed.

uri.description: Location of the artifact (R2 key, URL, etc.).

sha256.description: Content hash of the artifact for integrity verification.

artifacts.description: Referenced artifacts produced or consumed by this step.

bundleRevision.description: Revision of the policy bundle evaluated.

decisionId.description: Unique identifier for the policy decision.

policy.description: Policy evaluation context when the step involved a policy decision.

error.description: Error message when the step failed.

durationMs.description: Wall-clock duration of the step in milliseconds.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata attached to the evidence.
